_README: Optional, free, MANUAL strength overrides. Copy this file to data/adjustments.json and edit, then re-run tools/build_wc2026_dataset.py. Everything is €0 and transparent. Absent file = no change. Use team names exactly as in data/wc2026_power.json (e.g. 'United States' is 'USA', 'Czech Republic', 'Ivory Coast').

squad_value_eur_m._README: Squad #2: total squad market value in € millions, copied by hand from Transfermarkt's public 'most valuable national teams' page (no scraping needed — it's ~48 numbers). Z-scored across the teams you list and spread over squad_value_elo_span Elo points. List at least 8 teams to activate.

elo_delta._README: Injuries/suspensions #4 (or any judgement call): a direct Elo nudge per team, applied on top of squad value. Negative = weaker. Example scale: a confirmed top scorer or first-choice keeper out ≈ -20 to -40.

notes._README: Free-text reasons for the deltas above — for your own transparency; not used by the model.
